name: Minimalist
description: Clean whitespace with subtle gray scales and zero distractions.

classes.h1: text-2xl font-light mb-6 text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-[0.3em]
classes.h2: text-xl font-light mb-4 text-gray-800 uppercase tracking-[0.2em]
classes.h3: text-lg font-light mb-3 text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-widest
classes.h4: text-base font-light mb-3 text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider
classes.h5: text-sm font-light mb-2 text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider
classes.h6: text-xs font-light mb-2 text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider
classes.li: mb-2 text-gray-600 text-sm pl-4 border-l border-gray-200
classes.th: p-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider
classes.blockquote: border-l border-gray-200 pl-6 italic my-6 text-gray-400
